items.translatedEnglishPrompt: When driving a car with a fake license plate, driver's license, or vehicle registration certificate, the traffic inspector has the right to detain the vehicle and place it in the impound lot.

topMatches.masterPrompt: Traffic police can detain the vehicle according to law if it uses other vehicles license plate and driver's license.
A traffic police has the right to confiscate the driver's license if the car is not equipped with an insurance policy sign.
A traffic police has the right to detain a vehicle if the driver uses someone else's vehicle inspection sticker.
Traffic police can detain the vehicle which is suspected of using the falsified or altered license plate and driver's license.

If the registration paper, license plate and driver's license of a vehicle are lost or destroyed, the vehicle owner should apply for reissuing or replacing them to the vehicle management station at the residential place.
If the vehicle has no license plate, a label of inspection, or a label of insurance, preserve the scene and immediately report it to the police.
If a driver allows his vehicle to be driven by a person whose driving license has been revoked, the traffic police will detain the driving license.
The driver is required to attach the license plate to the car in accordance with the rules.
